title: D&D 2024 Feature Override (PHASE-8-DEPRECATED)
description: Schema for data/feature_override.json. This file is the legacy escape hatch for (a) attaching PDF-style summaries to class features that lack them inline, and (b) hiding features from the sheet that are pure system plumbing (subclass selector slots, Ability Score Improvement). It is scheduled for deletion in Phase 8 (D5 / D6-2: feature_kind migration); the schema is authored now solely so the contract is documented for the lifetime of the file. Top-level keys are class names; nested keys are feature names.
